name: faa-aircraft-registry-mcp-server
description: Offline, keyless lookup of the US civil aircraft registry (FAA Releasable Aircraft Database) — decode an N-number to aircraft, engine, status, and owner; search by owner, type, or state.

faa_redact_owner_pii.title: Redact owner PII
faa_redact_owner_pii.description: Redact registrant name/address and disable owner-name search. Keep 'true' (the safe default) for shared use; set 'false' only on a trusted personal install to expose full owner detail.
